title: R Graphical Packages Ecosystem & Workflow
description: A flowchart showing the core R graphical packages, their relationship to each other, and a typical workflow from data to final plot.
relationships: Base R Graphics provides the foundational system
grid is a low-level system that provides building blocks for lattice and ggplot2
lattice creates multi-panel plots based on the grid system
ggplot2 builds on grid and uses a layered grammar of graphics
ggpubr and patchwork are extensions that combine and arrange ggplot2 plots
Workflow progresses from raw data through a chosen package to a final visual output
